REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAUCHUNG, ELENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ELENA LAUCHUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMILY L. WILBURN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAUCHUNG, ELENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILBURN, EMILY L. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN HER BURDEN OF PROOF OF DEMONSTRATING WITH EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT SCRATCHED HER CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
